title: Cmd Confirm
description: Minecraft Fabric Mod. Requests confirmation, when using commands.
body:
# Cmd Confirm
### When using commands
sometimes fingers are faster than brain.
  
Minecraft Fabric Mod. Requests confirmation, when using commands.  
<details>
<summary>Good to know</summary>

- command "`/ccconfig`" opens ConfigScreen to add and remove commands.
- commands "`/kill`", "`/kill @p`" and "`kill @e`" are pre defined as example. Delete them, if you don't need them.
- cmds file is located in ".minecraft/config/cmd-confirm/cmds.txt".

</details>

![Confirmation-Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c5VRfEYd/images/6454a119eae563f0e8791396957a2bd485c540df.png)
![Config-Screen to add and remove commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c5VRfEYd/images/e2064ac2c315020f1f34beeedf72a95e5c976152.png)
  
<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>
  
- Fabric-Api

</details>
